title: [Moore] Add classDecl, handles, and basic class ops
body:
**Summary**
- Add a first-class **class system** to the Moore dialect: a class handle type, class declaration ops (fields & methods), and basic runtime ops (`class.new`, `class.field_ref`).
- Teach the Verilog importer to **recognize SystemVerilog classes**, emit class declarations, lower `new` expressions, and lower **member access** through the new ops.
- Wire in verifiers, builders, printing formats, and comprehensive tests.

- **New type**
  - `!moore.class.object<@C>` (`ClassHandleType`) — an opaque handle to a class instance.
    - Added to `UnpackedType::classof`.

- **New attributes / enums**
  - `ClassFlags` (Concrete, Abstract, Interface, Final)
  - `FieldVisibility` (Public, Protected, Local)
  - `FieldLifetime` (Automatic, Static)
  - `ClassFlagsAttr`, `FieldVisibilityAttr`, `FieldLifetimeAttr`

- **New class declaration ops**
  - `moore.class.classdecl` (symbol + single-block region; optional `extends`/`implements`)
  - `moore.class.propertydecl` (name, type, visibility, lifetime)
  - `moore.class.declend` (implicit region terminator)

- **New runtime class ops**
  - `moore.class.new : <@C>` → `!moore.class.object<@C>`
  - `moore.class.field_ref %inst, @field : <…> , <ref<T>>` — typed reference into an object

- **Import / lowering**
  - Class declarations materialized at module scope with flags, base class, and implemented interfaces.
  - `new` expressions lowered to `moore.class.new`.
  - Class **member access** lowers to `moore.class.field_ref` (no unnecessary reads).
  - `TypeVisitor` now maps Slang `ClassType` -> `ClassHandleType`, declaring class on demand.

- **Verifiers**
  - `ClassNewOp`: verify referenced class symbol names a `moore.class.classdecl`.
  - `ClassFieldRefOp`: verify base is `!moore.ref<class.object<…>>`, field exists in class, and result element type matches field type.
  - `ClassDeclOp`: region contains only `class.propertydecl`, `class.methoddecl`, and terminator.

- **Tests**
  - `test/Conversion/ImportVerilog/classes.sv`
    - Flags (Concrete/Abstract/Interface), inheritance, implements (single & multiple)
    - Packages, nested classes, class-in-module, `new` construction, property emission and order

  - `test/Dialect/Moore/classes.mlir`
    - Round-trip coverage for `classdecl`, properties, interfaces, extends/implements combinations

This patch does **not** yet lower class method bodies or virtual dispatch; only declarations and
simple ops needed by member access and `new`. IR remains stable for non-class features; changes are additive with minimal churn.
